title: Klinkraft
description: Containing Cobblemon, Create, Terralith, Farmer's Delight, Yung's various mods, and several Decoration focused mods. This pack is intended for some light fun, exploration, and being the very best at whatever you choose to do in it!
body: This pack uses Cobblemon, Create, and Terralith as a base to create a fun exploration and base building experience in the world of Cobblemon! Use Waystones to get around easily, and several decoration mods to really spruce up your home! Be the very best, whether that be as a trainer, and explorer, a builder, or some kind of made steam scientist! I made this pack at first for myself and friends, some of us like Cobblemon, some us like automation, some of us like to just explore. I tried to keep it smaller so more machines could play it and have fun when I had a thought, if we like it others might as well, so I hope you do have fun!
